2DE8BF6E5DCC|10|Frost reveals he’s read her record, using her grandmother to assert class power/omniscience.

9C28DA56EC8E|18|Marnette rejects speculation, reinforcing acceptance of ‘designated’ time.  
7E4B9382E451|19|Frost contrasts his long-lived memories with her truncated lineage, sharpening inequality.

2D31C9C9A5A8|21|Frost introduces the ‘container/manufactured’ idea: lifespan as engineered specification.
